seo.title: Hotel Commerce for Hotels, Partners & Platforms | Wink
seo.metaDescription: Wink helps hotels, partners and platforms create demand, distribute bookable inventory, and convert direct bookings.
seo.ogDescription: Create demand. Convert bookings. Keep the guest.

content.h1: Create demand. Convert bookings. Keep the guest.
content.summary: Wink connects hotels, partners and platforms into one commerce layer.

fields.h1: Create demand. Convert bookings. Keep the guest.
fields.lead: Wink connects hotels, partners and platforms into one commerce layer. Hotels manage the supply. Partners and platforms distribute it. Every booking flows through the same Booking Engine, so the hotel keeps the brand, the guest, and the relationship.
fields.supportLine: Free to set up. Free to use. We earn when you earn.
fields.visualLabel: Wink product journey from social post to booking

visuals.alt: Facebook post example with a bookable hotel offer
WinkLinks storefront cards with hotel offers
Booking Engine checkout page for a hotel booking

fields.heading: One platform for every route to a hotel booking.
fields.body: Wink is the hotel commerce platform that connects supply, content, partner demand, storefronts, checkout, attribution, and payment into one booking loop.

fields.heading: Travel commerce moved. The booking path has to move with it.
fields.body: Travel inspiration now starts in feeds, videos, partner recommendations, banking apps, group chats, newsletters, and search. Wink puts bookable hotel commerce closer to the moment of intent.

cards.title: Discovery moved to social.
cards.body: Travelers find hotels through content before they search by date. The selling path has to live closer to the post, the profile, and the recommendation.

cards.title: AI changed content production.
cards.body: Hotel teams can publish more often, but volume alone is not the advantage. The advantage is hotel voice, live inventory, and bookability.

cards.title: Direct matters again.
cards.body: Hotels want the guest. Partners want credit. Platforms want commerce, not read-only inventory. Wink gives each side a reason to keep the booking inside the loop.

fields.heading: Create. Distribute. Convert. Fulfill. Earn.
fields.body: Most travel products only handle one part of the chain. Wink connects the full path from content to confirmed booking, with attribution and payment flowing back to the right party.

cards.title: Create
cards.body: Generate on-brand content for rooms, F&B, spa, experiences, and destination moments.

cards.title: Distribute
cards.body: Turn hotel inventory into Social Links, Web Components, maps, grids, cards, and partner-ready assets.

cards.title: Convert
cards.body: Live pricing earns the click. On-brand content earns the trust. Bespoke deals close the booking.

cards.title: Fulfill
cards.body: Booking Engine completes rooms, packages, add-ons, spa, F&B, and experiences in one checkout.

cards.title: Earn
cards.body: Attribution, channel reporting, and partner payouts keep value connected to the source of demand.

fields.heading: Same hotel supply. Different ways to create demand.
fields.body: Every stakeholder enters Wink through a different door, but the booking logic underneath stays connected. Hotels control the supply. Partners bring audience demand. Platforms build on the same rails.

cards.title: For hotels
cards.body: Control your profile, rates, packages, sales channels, social selling, and partner distribution from one stack.

cards.title: For partners
cards.body: Find hotels that match your audience, build bookable links and storefronts, and earn on confirmed bookings within the attribution window.

cards.title: For platforms and developers
cards.body: Build hotel commerce into super apps, loyalty platforms, banking apps, agencies, and travel products using Wink inventory and commerce APIs.

fields.heading: Four modules on top. One Booking Engine underneath.
fields.body: Extranet, Studio, WinkSocial, and WinkLinks are the visible modules. Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko, and developer access make the commercial loop work underneath.

modules.title: Extranet
modules.body: Hotels set up property content, inventory, rates, promotions, sales channels, and Booking Engine configuration.

modules.title: Studio
modules.body: Hotels and partners create Social Links, Web Components, maps, grids, cards, and other bookable distribution assets.

modules.title: WinkSocial
modules.body: Hotels plan, generate, approve, and publish hospitality-native content in the hotel's voice, with bookable paths attached.

modules.title: WinkLinks
modules.body: Hotels and partners run mobile-first storefronts where bio links, campaign links, QR codes, and recommendations become bookable.

modules.title: Booking Engine
modules.body: The transaction core behind the stack: rooms, packages, add-ons, F&B, spa, and experiences in one checkout.

modules.title: Network
modules.body: The partner distribution layer where activated hotels can be discovered, shared, attributed, and sold by approved demand partners.

modules.title: Traveliko
modules.body: The Wink-operated consumer channel where activated hotels can be discovered and booked through the same commerce layer.

modules.title: API / SDKs
modules.body: The developer access layer for platforms building hotel search, booking, payment, attribution, and channel flows into their own products.

fields.heading: The product turns attention into a booking path.
fields.body: Follow the real product moments: Facebook post, Social Link, WinkLinks storefront, room selection, checkout, scheduling, and approval.

copy.heading: Bookable cards for social traffic.
copy.body: A post can become a card, a card can become a storefront, and a storefront can become a direct hotel-branded booking.
items: Checkout and approval screens are scaled to fit, not cropped.

fields.heading: Free to set up. Free to use. We earn when you earn.
fields.body: Wink is designed around confirmed booking value, not software seats or abstract traffic. Hotels can start without setup fees or monthly fees on the core platform, then scale as direct, partner, and platform demand grows.

cards.title: Core platform
cards.body: No setup fee and no monthly fee for the core platform.

cards.title: Booking-linked economics
cards.body: Wink earns on confirmed bookings, with partner commission added where partner demand is involved.

cards.title: WinkSocial layer
cards.body: Subscription pricing sits on top because WinkSocial includes AI content generation.

fields.heading: Learn the new direct-demand playbook.
fields.body: The resource hub helps hotels, partners, and platform teams understand how direct demand works now: social discovery, bookable content, channel control, attribution, and performance-aligned commerce.

cards.title: State of Direct Distribution
cards.body: Original research and market context on hotel direct demand and travel social commerce.

cards.title: Wink Academy
cards.body: Training for hotels and partners learning how to sell bookable hotel inventory.

cards.title: Docs
cards.body: Developer documentation for API, SDK, webhook, booking, payment, and platform integration work.

items.question: What is Wink?
items.answer: Wink is a closed-loop hotel commerce platform. It helps hotels manage inventory, create bookable content, distribute through partners and channels, and convert demand through one Booking Engine.

items.question: Who is Wink for?
items.answer: Wink is for hotels, partners, platforms, and developers. Hotels control supply. Partners bring demand. Platforms build with Wink inventory and commerce APIs.

items.question: Is Wink an OTA?
items.answer: No. Wink is the commerce infrastructure behind direct booking, social selling, partner distribution, and platform integrations. The hotel keeps the brand, the guest, and the relationship.

items.question: What products are inside Wink?
items.answer: The main modules are Extranet, Studio, WinkSocial, and WinkLinks. The platform also includes Booking Engine, Network, Traveliko, and API / SDK access.

items.question: How does Wink help hotels sell direct?
items.answer: Hotels can embed the Booking Engine on their own site, run bookable WinkLinks, create Social Links and Web Components in Studio, publish bookable content through WinkSocial, and activate partner demand through Network.

items.question: Where does Traveliko fit?
items.answer: Traveliko is a Wink-operated consumer channel inside the platform layer. It is not a separate homepage audience path.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with a Wink account, request a platform demo, or choose the path that fits your role. Hotels, partners and platforms all connect to the same booking loop.

faqQuestions: How does Wink help hotels sell direct?
